news.title: Rupee posts biggest daily gain in 2 months, closes at 94.94 vs USD as RBI ramps up currency defence
news.description: The rupee gained 0.9% to end at 94.9450 per dollar, its biggest gain since April 2. Forward premiums, ‌the cost of hedging ⁠FX ⁠exposure, plunged to 2.67 rupees, the lowest this financial year, down from 2.85 rupees.
